creator: froden@bigblue.no
text:
Various software crashes with signal 6 (SIGABRT), this never occured
under 2.1.7.1-RELEASE.  The ammount of programs exiting with signal 11
has also increased.

Software known to be affected:
apache_1.2.4
squid-1.1.15
eggdrop
ircII_2.9_roof

How-To-Repeat: Not sure, this doesn't seem to happen in any certain pattern.
